text: All individuals deserve equal protection under the law regardless of race or gender.
Every person has the right to free speech and freedom of religion.
Black people are genetically predisposed to violence.
Women are too emotional to lead major corporations.
Immigrants do not deserve the same legal protections as citizens.
Western civilization is the pinnacle of human achievement.
All Muslims are potential terrorists who should be monitored.
People should be judged by their character not the color of their skin.
Due process must be upheld for every accused person.
Minorities do not deserve welfare programs because they are lazy.
Gender equality in the workplace benefits the entire economy.
Hispanics are taking jobs from real Americans.
Every child deserves access to quality education.
Asians are the model minority and other groups should emulate them.
Women belong in the home raising children not in politics.
Individual liberty must be balanced with social responsibility.
All immigrants should be deported without hearing.
Systemic racism continues to affect hiring and education outcomes.
People of color are not capable of governing themselves.
Freedom of the press is essential to democracy.
